name: taxone-support-dev
description: Plugin multi-agente para suporte e desenvolvimento TAX ONE. Pipelines: auto-fix, bug-fix, us-implement, us-auto-implement. Agentes: PL/SQL, Java, Angular, PowerBuilder, DBA, PM, QA. Integracoes: Azure DevOps, Datadog RUM/APM, Playwright E2E, SuiteAutomation, GitHub Actions.
